'''Shulstine V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region.

==History==
Shulstine V joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[Indecta Era]]. During the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], it supported [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

It was a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
